Class PineconeVectorStore.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<PineconeVectorStore.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.pinecone.PineconeVectorStore.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
VectorStore.Builder<PineconeVectorStore.Builder>
Enclosing class:
PineconeVectorStore
public static class PineconeVectorStore.Builder extends AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<PineconeVectorStore.Builder>
Builder class for creating PineconeVectorStore instances. This implements a type-safe step builder pattern to ensure all required fields are provided in a specific order before optional configuration. The required fields must be provided in this sequence: 1. embeddingModel (via builder method) 2. apiKey 3. indexName After all required fields are set, optional configurations can be provided using the fluent builder pattern. Example usage: 
PineconeVectorStore store = PineconeVectorStore.builder(embeddingModel)
    .apiKey("your-api-key")
    .indexName("your-index")
    .namespace("optional")  // optional configuration
    .build();
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Adam Bchouti, Soby Chacko, Thomas Vitale, Ilayaperumal Gopinathan, chabinhwang

    static interface 
    PineconeVectorStore.Builder.BuilderWithIndexName
    Final step interface requiring index name configuration.
    static class 
    PineconeVectorStore.Builder.StepBuilder
    Internal implementation of the step builder pattern using records for immutability.

  • Method Details

    • namespace

      public PineconeVectorStore.Builder namespace(@Nullable String namespace)
      Sets the Pinecone namespace. Note: The free-tier (gcp-starter) doesn't support Namespaces.
      Parameters:
      namespace - The namespace to use (leave empty for free tier)
      Returns:
      The builder instance

    • contentFieldName

      public PineconeVectorStore.Builder contentFieldName(@Nullable String contentFieldName)
      Sets the content field name.
      Parameters:
      contentFieldName - The content field name to use
      Returns:
      The builder instance

      Sets the distance metadata field name.
      Parameters:
      distanceMetadataFieldName - The distance metadata field name to use
      Returns:
      The builder instance

    • build

      public PineconeVectorStore build()
      Builds a new PineconeVectorStore instance with the configured properties.
      Returns:
      A new PineconeVectorStore instance
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the builder is in an invalid state
